message:
web: Add infinite scroll with cursor-based pagination

- Add paginated query with (userId, createdAt, id) cursor
- Add composite index for efficient pagination
- Create useInfiniteScroll hook with IntersectionObserver
- Create ClientOnly component for SSR-safe rendering
- Show random inspirational quote at end of list
- Add e2e tests for infinite scroll behavior

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/gn166i5opo

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+DROP INDEX `idx_user_created_at`;--> statement-breakpoint
+CREATE INDEX `idx_user_created_at` ON `transcripts` (`user_id`,`created_at`,`id`);
\ No newline at end of file
